sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5689" key="a)mferkh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφερκής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n5689.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fenced round,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πίθος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0309.tlg001:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Achae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
